title: Policy
description: docs/adr/021-policy-engine-zero-trust.md: a typed governance rule set, loaded from a separate channel (--policies / .datascape/policies/), never from the governed manifest set. Deliberately NOT under apiVersion datascape.io/v1alpha1 and NOT registered in schemas.KindFiles (ADR 021 §1) — Policy is a distinct input, not a resource kind.

items.description: Exactly one of (match+assert), matchFinding, matchPlan, matchEdge, or matchGrant must be set — a Go-level invariant (internal/domain/policy.Validate), not expressible as a plain JSON Schema oneOf without duplicating every property branch.

id.description: Globally unique across every loaded policy — the explain-catalog key and the exemption-annotation key.

match.description: Selects which resources a match+assert rule applies to. Kind/label/name selectors only — no spec-field selector (that's assert's job).

kind.description: A single Kind ("Connection") or a list ("[Dataset, Source]").

assert.description: The condition match's selected resources must satisfy. Exactly one of equals/notEquals/in/absent/matches (internal/domain/policy.Validate enforces this).

field.description: A dotted path into the resolved envelope, e.g. spec.scheme, metadata.protect, spec.configuration.image.

matches.description: An RE2 regular expression, matched against the field's stringified value.

matchFinding.description: Escalates every design-lint finding (docs/adr/020) with this code to this rule's effect.

matchPlan.description: Selects plan entries by action x kind, evaluated at plan/apply/destroy time (never at validate, since no plan exists yet).

matchEdge.description: Selects graph edges rather than resources (docs/adr/022 Ring 0). crossDomain is the only edge shape this vocabulary defines.

crossDomain.description: Matches a domain-to-domain data-flow edge: a Binding's sourceRef domain -> targetRef domain, or a connectionRef consumer's own domain -> the Connection it references.

from.description: The edge's source metadata.domain, matched exactly.

to.description: The edge's target metadata.domain, matched exactly.

matchGrant.description: Selects docs/adr/026 §2 spec.access wide-grant declarations (docs/planning/08 H7) rather than resources or graph edges — "deny/warn any resource that declares a wide grant to this namespace" (ADR 026 decision 2).

namespace.description: Matches a grant naming this namespace exactly.

exemptible.description: Whether metadata.annotations["policy.datascape.io/exempt"] may waive this rule. Defaults to false — a non-exemptible deny has no in-manifest escape (ADR 021 §3).

message.description: Human-readable text shown alongside the rule id and resource when this rule fires.
